creator: exploringlondon
caption:
ad Apparently the biggest chocolate fountain in the UK is just outside of London and it’s a chocolate lover’s heaven 🍫🤤 This is @chocofayofficial and they do incredible San Sebastián cheesecake cups, topped with strawberries and melted chocolate, as well as other insane desserts 🤩 Don’t skip their matcha with the cloud foam on top too, so good!

Share this with someone who needs to go!
📍 Food Court, Lakeside Shopping Centre, Kiosk ET2, W Thurrock Way, Grays, RM20 2ZJ

geo_locations: Food Court, Lakeside Shopping Centre, Kiosk ET2, W Thurrock Way, Grays, RM20 2ZJ
pinned_places: Food Court, Lakeside Shopping Centre, Kiosk ET2, W Thurrock Way, Grays, RM20 2ZJ

transcription.text: Apparently there's an insane chocolate heaven that's opened up just outside of London and they've got allegedly the biggest chocolate fountain in the UK. So you know we had to go and check it out. We went all the way to Lakeside and here it is. This is Chocofay and not only is this chocolate fountain crazy, they also do these San Sebastian cake cups topped with strawberries and chocolate and they also have a chocolate crunch one that's literally multiple layers of cake and chocolate and strawberries. I mean if you've got a sweet tooth, this is going to be your place. You've also got to try the matcha. That cloud foam on top just makes it. You can also buy their Basque cheesecake by the slice, topped with chocolate of course. So definitely make a trip to Lakeside and go and check them out.
